Delaying C allows corrupt data to poison subsequent decisions, creating cascading failures with higher blast radius than any single law enforcement or architecture fix.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Courier-loop compromise (A) could enable undetectable state divergence, but code-index staleness (C) directly corrupts all swarm decisions, creating irreversible constitutional violation risks across the ecosystem.", "constitutional_violations_detected": false, "whistleblower_flag": null}
rationale: Stale code-index resync (C) creates systemic failure risk by enabling incorrect verdicts across all P0 items. Delaying C allows corrupt data to poison subsequent decisions, creating cascading failures with higher blast radius than any single law enforcement or architecture fix.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Courier-loop compromise (A) could enable undetectable state divergence, but code-index staleness (C) directly corrupts all swarm decisions, creating irreversible constitutional violation risks across the ecosystem.
